name: Temple Run
author: Poki
description: Get ready to run for your life in Temple Run! In this original version of the famous endless runner, it's up to you to steal the idol and get away from the monsters. While making your way through the temple and jungle, you'll have to dive, jump and slide to make your way past obstacles. Finish exciting challenges to gain more coins and buy power-ups to extend your run. You can also unlock strong abilities that will let you gather more coins, run faster or gain a protective shield for a while. Do you have what it takes to get out of the temple? How to play Temple Run? Use WASD or the Arrow Keys to move! Use Spacebar to jump! Who created Temple Run? Temple Run was created by Imanji. Play their other games on Poki: Temple Run 2 , Temple Run 2: Spooky Summit and Temple Run 2: Jungle Fall ! How can I play Temple Run for free? You can play Temple Run for free on Poki. Can I play Temple Run on mobile devices and desktop? Temple Run can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
